func (edm *EnhancedDegradeManager) ForceDegrade(level DegradeLevel, reason string) {
	edm.mu.Lock()

	edm.levelChangedAt = time.Now()
	edm.mu.Unlock()

	actions := edm.config.LevelActions[level]
	edm.executeActions(actions, oldLevel, level)

// IsLiveTrading 是否在实盘模式
func (g *LiveRiskGuard) IsLiveTrading() bool {
	g.mu.RLock()
	defer g.mu.RUnlock()
	return g.isLiveTrading
}

// GetStatus 获取风控状态
func (g *LiveRiskGuard) GetStatus() map[string]interface{} {
	g.stats.mu.RLock()
	dailyOrders := g.stats.DailyOrders
	dailyFilledOrders := g.stats.DailyFilledOrders
	dailyVolume := g.stats.DailyVolume
	dailyPnL := g.stats.DailyPnL
	dailyFees := g.stats.DailyFees
	currentPosition := g.stats.CurrentPosition
	positionValue := g.stats.PositionValue
	currentDrawdown := g.stats.CurrentDrawdown
	marginLevel := g.stats.MarginLevel
	g.stats.mu.RUnlock()

	g.mu.RLock()
	isLive := g.isLiveTrading
	g.mu.RUnlock()

	// 检查紧急停止
	shouldStop, stopReason := g.CheckEmergencyStop()

	return map[string]interface{}{

:         g.config.RiskLevel.String(),
	}
}

	g.stats.mu.Lock()

	g.stats.CurrentDrawdown = 0

// IsLiveTrading 是否在实盘模式
func (g *LiveRiskGuard) IsLiveTrading() bool {
	g.mu.RLock()
	defer g.mu.RUnlock()
	return g.isLiveTrading
}

// GetStatus 获取风控状态
func (g *LiveRiskGuard) GetStatus() map[string]interface{} {
	g.stats.mu.RLock()
	dailyOrders := g.stats.DailyOrders
	dailyFilledOrders := g.stats.DailyFilledOrders
	dailyVolume := g.stats.DailyVolume
	dailyPnL := g.stats.DailyPnL
	dailyFees := g.stats.DailyFees
	currentPosition := g.stats.CurrentPosition
	positionValue := g.stats.PositionValue
	currentDrawdown := g.stats.CurrentDrawdown
	marginLevel := g.stats.MarginLevel
	g.stats.mu.RUnlock()

	g.mu.RLock()
	isLive := g.isLiveTrading
	g.mu.RUnlock()

	// 检查紧急停止
	shouldStop, stopReason := g.CheckEmergencyStop()

	return map[string]interface{}{

:         g.config.RiskLevel.String(),
	}
}
